summary: Full frontend testing of OperatingStandardPage (/operating-standard) and navbar changes. All 18 required features verified and passing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Operating Standard page fully tested and working. Navbar two-zone layout (Framework + Access) with divider working at 1920px desktop. Mobile menu at 390px shows FRAMEWORK and ACCESS sections with divider. LaunchPath Standard nav link is active/underlined on /operating-standard. All 8 sections, 4 pillars, 4 AUTO vectors, 6 guards with FMCSA regs, 4 phases, 4 FOR/NOT FOR bullets, and CTA buttons all verified.

test_results.navbar_two_zone_layout: PASS - Knowledge Center, AUTO Method, LaunchPath Standard, REACH Assessment in left zone
test_results.ground0_gold_cta: PASS - data-testid=nav-ground0-btn visible with gold border styling
test_results.navbar_divider: PASS - 1px divider div between Ground 0 and About verified via JS evaluation
test_results.navbar_right_zone: PASS - About link and Operator Portal (data-testid=nav-portal-btn) visible
test_results.launchpath_standard_active: PASS - border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gold-primary) confirmed active style
test_results.hero_title: PASS - 'The LaunchPath Operating Standard' renders at /operating-standard
test_results.hero_subtitle: PASS - 'prevent authority loss, insurance failure, and compliance breakdown' present
test_results.section_01: PASS - WHY THIS STANDARD EXISTS with reality statement
test_results.section_02_four_pillars: PASS - Authority Protection, Insurance Continuity, Compliance Backbone, Cash-Flow Oxygen
test_results.section_03_auto_model: PASS - AROUND, UNDER, THROUGH, OVER boxes visible
test_results.section_04_six_guards: PASS - All 6 guards visible with data-testid guard-row-0 through guard-row-5 and FMCSA regs (49 CFR Part 391/382/395/396/387/365)
test_results.section_05_phases: PASS - Authority Stabilization, Compliance Infrastructure, Operational Oversight, Audit Readiness
